ALL BUG REPORTS MUST INCLUDE A LOG
Log files can be found in your minecraft installation folder in /logs/latest.log
Reports without a log will be closed

A BIG help would be if you turn on verbose logging in the configuration settings for Railways Untold and then reproduce the bug. This logging creates a very large text file, but it contains very helpful information for me to track the bug down.

-----------------------------------------------

1. Describe the bug, what is happening in the world, provide screenshots if applicable:
